bear_claw_grip.description: Bear claw knife grip demonstration - safe finger positioning for cutting
bear_claw_grip.notes: Search: 'bear claw grip knife skills' on YouTube for professional tutorials from culinary schools

basic_cuts.description: Dice, mince, julienne demonstration - fundamental knife cuts every cook needs
basic_cuts.notes: Popular sources: ICE (Institute of Culinary Education) with Chef James Briscione, Wüsthof knife company tutorials

reading_the_pan.description: Pan temperature and heat control - water droplet test and oil shimmer
reading_the_pan.notes: Look for: 'how to read pan temperature' 'oil shimmer ready to cook' tutorials

dry_vs_moist_heat.description: Searing vs braising comparison - when to use dry vs moist cooking methods
dry_vs_moist_heat.notes: Search: 'dry heat vs moist heat cooking' 'searing meat vs braising' professional chef comparisons

aromatics_soffritto.description: Cooking aromatics and soffritto base - building flavor foundations with onion carrot celery
aromatics_soffritto.notes: Popular: Basics with Babish 'soffritto' Italian cooking shows 'mirepoix soffritto' tutorials

seasoning_with_salt.description: Salting and seasoning technique - layering salt throughout cooking process
seasoning_with_salt.notes: Search: 'how to salt food properly' 'seasoning at different stages' Salt Fat Acid Heat methodology

acid_balance.description: Using acid to balance flavor - lemon juice vinegar brightening dishes
acid_balance.notes: Related: Salt Fat Acid Heat (Netflix series) Kenji López-Alt finishing with acid tutorials

searing_meat.description: Getting a proper sear on protein - achieving Maillard reaction golden crust
searing_meat.notes: Popular sources: Serious Eats, Good Eats Alton Brown 'how to sear meat properly' Maillard reaction explained

knowing_doneness.description: Testing protein for doneness - touch test visual cues thermometer readings
knowing_doneness.notes: Search: 'finger touch test doneness' 'internal temperature guide' 'is my chicken done' tutorials

pan_sauce_fundamentals.description: Building a pan sauce from fond - deglazing scraping reduction mounting butter
pan_sauce_fundamentals.notes: Key searches: 'how to make pan sauce' 'deglaze fond' 'restaurant quality sauce at home'

emulsification_basics.description: Emulsification and sauce technique - combining fat and water into stable sauce
emulsification_basics.notes: Look for: 'how to make mayonnaise' 'vinaigrette emulsion' 'broken sauce rescue' Alton Brown explanations

mise_en_place.description: Mise en place preparation method - organizing ingredients before cooking
mise_en_place.notes: Search: 'mise en place explained' 'professional kitchen prep' 'cooking organization tips' culinary school basics
